description: Geode Systems develops RAMADDA, a repository and content-management platform for organizing, searching, and processing datasets, files, maps, and documents. Its public site exposes repository search and data-processing API endpoints under the main geodesystems.com host.
summary: Geode Systems exposes one public HTTP API surface for its RAMADDA repository, documented via a legacy Swagger endpoint and mirrored by an APIs.guru-derived OpenAPI listing; no GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surface was found.
